author: Christian Lempa
description: A customized kanban-style drag-and-drop custom view for Obsidian Bases. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Christian Lempa
manifest.description: A customized kanban-style drag-and-drop custom view for Bases.
manifest.name: Kanban Bases View CL

name: Kanban Bases View CL

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix Obsidian review feedback by removing redundant wording from the plugin description and updating the README fork link.
- Sync the upstream swimlane fix that shows remove buttons for columns that are empty across all lanes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial custom fork release:

- Uses a unique plugin ID (`kanban-bases-view-cl`) and Bases view type (`kanban-view-cl`) so it can coexist with the upstream Kanban Bases View plugin.
- Adds custom card image gallery support for list properties containing multiple images.
- Adds per-group column collapse controls.
- Adds configurable column width options.
- Keeps the upstream kanban Bases view features: drag-and-drop cards, quick add buttons, swimlanes, column ordering, column colors, custom card titles, cover images, and property display options.
